originalTitle: German army looks to Ukraine for battlefield lessons
summary: Land forces chief says Kyiv’s military expertise is proving invaluable as Bundeswehr rebuilds and US support wanes
content: Land forces chief says Kyiv’s military expertise is proving invaluable as Bundeswehr rebuilds and US support wanes
chineseTitle: 德国军队向乌克兰学习战场教训
chineseSummary: 陆军参谋长表示，随着德国联邦国防军的重建和美国支持的减弱，基辅的军事专业知识被证明是无价的
